akitaDAO.descr: the app ID of the Akita DAO

akitaDAOEscrow.descr: the app ID for the akita DAO escrow to use

childContractVersion.descr: the current version of the child contract

revocation.descr: the default app thats allowed to revoke plugins

version.descr: the current version of the contract

methods.name: updateWallet
methods.desc:
Permanent: Update a wallet's bytecode. The caller must be the wallet's admin.
The factory sends the update inner txn as itself (factory address), which the
wallet accepts because Txn.sender === factoryApp.address.

methods.name: optIn

args.name: asset
args.desc: The asset to be opted into

methods.desc: optin tells the contract to opt into an asa
